---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a product or engineering enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement
What user or business problem are we solving?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the desired behavior and scope.

## User Story
As a <role>, I want <capability>, so that <benefit>.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Non-Goals
What is explicitly out of scope?

## Risks and Dependencies
List technical risks and external dependencies.

## Success Metrics
How will we measure impact?

## Alternatives Considered
List alternatives and why they are less suitable.
